name: Choc. Fondue with Fruit & Cake
recipeIngredient: One and a half cups Sugar
Quarter cup (plus two tablespoons) Orange liqueur
Pound cake, cubed into 1.25 inch pieces
Bananas, cut into one inch chunks
Fresh fruit including apples, pears, cherries with stems, peaches, pineapple, strawberries
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt the butter and chocolate over low heat.
2. Add sugar, half-and-half, and salt. Bring to a boil, cooking on medium heat until it reaches a slow rolling boil, stirring constantly for 5 minutes until thickened.
3. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve. When ready, reheat the chocolate sauce in the microwave for 20-30 seconds. Add liqueur and stir thoroughly.
4. Serve immediately with fruit and cake.
5. For two people: Pour one cup of warm chocolate sauce into a dessert fondue pot and place over heat. On a dinner plate, arrange pound cake cubes, bananas, fresh fruit, and marshmallows attractively. Serve with two fondue forks and two dessert plates.
